name: Pai Honolulu
tagline: Hidden courtyard fine dining near Aloha Tower — chef-owned, locally sourced, and genuinely hard to find unless someone tells you.
mustOrder: seasonal tasting menu — changes regularly based on local sourcing
a la carte dishes — everything is made in-house
ask chef Kevin Lee what's best that night
parking: Harbor Court parking; street parking on Merchant St
talkStory: Chef-owned by Kevin Lee since 2017, tucked in a courtyard at Harbor Court near Aloha Tower. The hidden location is part of the charm — you have to seek it out. Offers both a la carte and seasonal tasting menus, everything locally sourced and made in-house. The courtyard setting is quiet and elegant. A place for people who care about craft. Dinner only, Thu–Sat.
